  "stats": "Speed: 20cm\nTurn: 45°\nShield: 3\nArmour: 6+ front * / 5+\nTurret: 4\nBase: 32mm\n\n• The gravitic hooks of Custodian battleships are enclosed in a single shrouded, hangar- type enclosure specifically designed for Kir’la (Warden) gunships and are unsuitable for the transport of or to count for other escort types.\n• Custodian battleships cannot undergo Come To New Heading special orders.\n• Custodian battleships are equipped with a deflector that raises its prow armour to 6+. This is disabled whenever the vessel suffers a prow critical hit (repairable normally).\n• The Custodian has an integrated Tracking System coupled to an extremely sophisticated sensor suite.
